##LOCALITY=Zagi Mountain, near Hammedabad, Khaffor Dehri, North-West Frontier Province, Pakistan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Herb Obodda

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
